name: spt-vision-tester
description: Local-only SPT offline UI tests with built-in Raid flows and validated custom action scenarios.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded local SPT offline UI tests.
interface.longDescription: SPT Vision Tester launches configured local SPT components, runs normal, no-AI, or validated custom action scenarios, captures screenshots, collects logs, and stops only recorded processes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use spt-vision-tester for a local SPT offline visual smoke test.
